description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a single, straight trunk supporting a rounded, multi-layered canopy. The trunk is relatively slender and dark, branching out into several main limbs that further subdivide into smaller branches. The foliage consists of numerous broad, flat leaves that are a muted brownish-yellow, suggesting autumnal coloration. The canopy is moderately dense, allowing some light to filter through the gaps between leaves and branches. The tree's overall silhouette is somewhat symmetrical, with a gentle taper from the broadest part of the canopy down to the trunk. No roots are visible above ground, and the tree appears well-suited for placement in urban parks, sidewalks, or residential streets.
description: A medium-sized deciduous tree with a straight trunk and a rounded, moderately dense canopy of brownish-yellow leaves, typical of autumn.
description_view_0: The tree is seen at a slight angle, showing the trunk and a rounded canopy with some branches visible on the left side.
description_view_1: A direct side view reveals the full height of the tree and the layered structure of the canopy, with the trunk mostly centered.
description_view_2: This view highlights the broadest part of the canopy, with the trunk slightly off-center and more foliage visible on the left.
description_view_3: A nearly frontal view, showing the symmetrical shape of the canopy and the straight trunk beneath.
